provisions.title: ALCELDES FEES
provisions.content:
MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOMINGO.
              Executive Order No. 662.
                ALCALDES’ FEES.
                  0. G. No. 3250.

    E y virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
of Santo Domingo, the following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
       ARTICLE 1. Article 2 of E x x u t i v e Order No. 361 is
hereby amended by adding a t the end thereof the following:
       “On and a f t e r September 1, 1921, the Alcaldesshall recsire
f o r services peiforined the fees prescribed by Chapter XIV,
Title I, of the T a r i i n de Costm Judiciales, as amended by Exec-
utive Order No. 239”.
    ARTICLE 2. Ali laws or parts of lams in conflict here-
with a r e hereby repealed.
                                  S. S. ROBISON,
                         Rear-Admiral, United St.ates Navy,
                        Military Governor of Santo Domingo.
Santo Domingo, D. R.,
August 22,1921.

    MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOIlINGO.
                Executive Order No. 663.
         Title: A d d i t i o m l funds f o t~h e Cemzis.
                        0. G. No. 3250.

    By virtue of the powers vested in the Mdlitary Government
of Santo Domingo, the following order is hereby dictated and
promulgated :
     1. There is hereby appropriated from funds of the Natio-
nal Treasury not otherwise obligated, the sum of THREE
THOUSAND DOLLARS ($3,000) towards the completion of
the First National Census of the Dominican Republic.
                                   S. S. ROBISON,
                         Rear-Admiral, United States Navy,
                        Military Governor of Santo Domingo.
Santo Domingo, D. R.,
August 23, 1921.
